contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Interested in discussing this project or exploring collaboration opportunities?
contact.projectDescription: This is a portfolio project showcasing full-stack development skills with modern web technologies. Built to demonstrate clean architecture, scalable design, and attention to detail.

about.title: About This Project
about.intro: A comprehensive showcase of modern full-stack engineering with emphasis on maintainability, clarity, and scalability.

modular.title: Modular Architecture
modular.description: Features are broken down into small, focused components and services, making the codebase easy to navigate and extend.

separation.title: Separation of Concerns
separation.description: UI, business logic, configuration, and data access are clearly separated, following best practices for both React and backend frameworks.

reusability.title: Reusability
reusability.description: Components, hooks, and utility functions are designed to be reused throughout the application, reducing duplication.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: The structure supports adding new features, modules, or endpoints with minimal friction, suitable for long-term growth.

readability.title: Readability & Onboarding
readability.description: Consistent patterns and clear organization make it easy for new contributors to understand and work with the code.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: User-facing strings are externalized for easy translation and localization across multiple languages.

tooling.title: Modern Tooling
tooling.description: Leverages TypeScript, automated formatting, linting, and a robust build system for reliability and productivity.

about.explore: Discover the features, architecture, and documentation to learn more about this project and my approach to software engineering.

architecture.title: Architecture & Tech Stack
architecture.subtitle: A modern, scalable full-stack application built with industry-leading technologies

modular.title: Modular Architecture
modular.description: Clean separation of concerns with reusable components

typeSafety.title: Type Safety
typeSafety.description: End-to-end TypeScript for reliability and developer experience

scalable.title: Scalable Design
scalable.description: Built to grow with containerization and modern DevOps

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Explore the powerful features that make this basketball platform comprehensive and user-friendly

leaderboards.title: Championship Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: Real-time standings and rankings for all championship levels with detailed statistics and team performance metrics.

matchSummary.title: Detailed Match Summary
matchSummary.description: Comprehensive match breakdowns with player statistics, team comparisons, shot charts, and chronological event timeline.

shotCharts.title: Interactive Shot Charts
shotCharts.description: Visual representation of player shot locations with heatmaps, success rates, and detailed position analysis.

playerComparison.title: Player Comparison
playerComparison.description: Side-by-side player statistics comparison across multiple metrics including points, rebounds, assists, and efficiency.

clubsMap.title: Interactive Clubs Map
clubsMap.description: Geographic visualization of clubs across France with filtering by region, department, and competition level.

teamRosters.title: Team Rosters
teamRosters.description: Complete team rosters with player profiles, positions, and detailed statistics for each team member.

matchSchedule.title: Match Schedules
matchSchedule.description: Comprehensive match calendars with dates, venues, and results for all competitions and divisions.

liveStats.title: Live Match Statistics
liveStats.description: Real-time match statistics with possession tracking, momentum analysis, and live play-by-play updates.

liveUpdates.title: Live Score Updates
liveUpdates.description: WebSocket-powered real-time score updates and match events as they happen on the court.

userAccounts.title: User Accounts & Favorites
userAccounts.description: Personalized experience with saved teams, followed players, and customized notifications.

i18n.title: Multi-language Support
i18n.description: Full French and English translations for a global audience

search.title: Advanced Search & Filters
search.description: Powerful filtering and search across teams, players, and competitions

responsive.title: Fully Responsive
responsive.description: Optimized experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Comprehensive documentation covering setup, architecture, API reference, and contribution guidelines.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.content: Learn how to set up and run the project locally for development.

database.title: Database Schema
database.content: Explore the complete database schema with entity relationships, table structures, and data flow.

structure.title: Project Structure
structure.content: Understand the organization of the codebase with clear separation between frontend and backend modules.

bestPractices.title: Best Practices
bestPractices.content: Key engineering principles and patterns implemented throughout this project.

database.diagramAlt: Database schema diagram showing all entities and their relationships

structure.frontendCode:
app/            # Next.js App Router (routing, layouts, pages)
  (public)/      # Public routes (clubs, competitions, matches, players, teams)
  (auth)/        # Auth routes (login, register)
  api/           # API routes
features/        # Feature modules (domain logic, UI, hooks, api)
  └── clubs/     # Example feature
      ├── components/
      ├── hooks/
      ├── api/
      ├── utils/
      ├── constants/
      ├── types/
      └── index.ts
shared/          # Shared components, hooks, utils, types
lib/             # External integrations, providers, API clients
styles/          # Global styles and themes
public/          # Static assets
structure.routingExplanation: All routing is handled in app/ using Next.js App Router conventions.
structure.featurePrinciple: Each feature (e.g. 'clubs') contains its own components, hooks, api, utils, constants, types, and index.ts for modularity.
structure.sharedExplanation: Reusable code (components, hooks, utils, types) lives in shared/.
structure.libExplanation: External libraries, API clients, and providers are in lib/.
structure.stylesExplanation: Global styles and themes are in styles/.
structure.publicExplanation: Static files are served from public/.

bestPractices.modular: Modular architecture with domain-driven design principles
bestPractices.typeScript: Type-safe development with TypeScript across the entire stack
bestPractices.testing: Comprehensive unit and integration testing with Jest
bestPractices.documentation: Clear inline documentation and API specifications
bestPractices.gitWorkflow: Git workflow with feature branches and pull requests
bestPractices.codeReview: Code review process ensuring quality and consistency
